commit.message:
Tier-1 enrichment pass 2: enrich 316 more funds via WebSearch

Searched announcement URLs for 316 funds still needing enrichment:
- firmWebsite: +250 (total 392 / 949 = 41.3%)
- generalPartners: +220 real GP names (total 340 / 949 = 35.8%)
- stageFocus: +249 non-default (total 396 / 949 = 41.7%)
- sectorFocus: +133 non-default (total 263 / 949 = 27.7%)
- spinout: +12 (total 33)
- firmLogoUrl: +250 Google favicon URLs (total 392 / 949 = 41.3%)

All 949 funds pass Zod schema validation. Build succeeds.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix EvalResult unpacking in grid search for IDS evaluator

GridSearchStrategy.optimize() used tuple unpacking (ce, acc, bit_acc = evals[0])
which relies on EvalResult.__iter__. IDS evaluator sets f1_macro but not
bit_accuracy, so __iter__ yields only 2 values. Switch to named attribute
access which is always safe.

feat: implement Entity CRUD with Atlas-compatible type validation

- Entity struct with all Atlas fields (guid, typeName, attributes, classifications, etc.)
- EntityHeader, EntityExtInfo, EntityWithExtInfo, EntitiesWithExtInfo types
- Classification with TimeBoundary for validity periods
- ObjectId for entity references

- Validates entity against type definition before create/update
- Checks required attributes (isOptional: false)
- Validates attribute types (string, int, boolean, float, etc.)
- Returns appropriate errors: TypeNotFound, Validation

- KvEntityStore with TypeStore dependency for validation
- Full CRUD operations using surrealkv
- Type index for entity lookups by type

- POST /api/metavisor/v1/entity - Create entity
- POST /api/metavisor/v1/entity/bulk - Bulk create entities
- GET /api/metavisor/v1/entity/guid/{guid} - Get entity by GUID
- PUT /api/metavisor/v1/entity - Update entity
- DELETE /api/metavisor/v1/entity/guid/{guid} - Delete entity

- 18 storage unit tests (including 5 validation tests)
- 8 entity integration tests
- All 51 unit tests + 21 integration tests passing

fix: populate source map in transformAngularFile when sourcemap option is enabled (#100)

The edit-based transform pipeline never generated source maps, leaving
`TransformResult.map` as `None` even when `sourcemap: true`. Add
`apply_edits_with_sourcemap` that produces a source map by analyzing
which original byte ranges survive in the output, and wire it into the
AOT, JIT, and no-Angular-classes code paths.

- Close https://github.com/voidzero-dev/oxc-angular-compiler/issues/99

commit.message:
fix: drop broken pilot_denorm_sync_trigger that blocked all pilot updates

The sync_pilot_request_denormalization() trigger referenced NEW.full_name
which doesn't exist on the pilots table (only first_name, middle_name,
last_name exist). This caused every pilot UPDATE to fail with a database
error. The sync_pilot_to_requests trigger already covers the same
denormalization correctly.

commit.message:
fix: add luxury + blossom to VALID_LAYOUTS in hero settings API

The POST /api/admin/settings/hero route was rejecting layout values
"luxury" and "blossom" with a 400 error — making it impossible to save
either layout from the admin panel. Added both to VALID_LAYOUTS.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix upload timeout: split job upload into 100-job chunks

Previously, all jobs for a country (~900 for Germany) were sent in a
single POST to /sync_jobs, causing the Railway backend to process
~2700 sequential DB queries in one request. This took 286s and Railway
disconnected before completing (RemoteDisconnected).

Now the upload sends batches of 100 jobs per request (120s timeout
each), so each chunk finishes well within Railway's limits. Failed
chunks are reported individually but don't kill the whole upload.

commit.message:
[FIX] Video URL endpoint — code reviewer fixes (route order, bare-key guard, Literal type)

Addresses findings from code review agent:
- Route order: /{video_id}/url now registered before /{video_id} (FastAPI best practice)
- Bare-key fallback: added startswith("http") guard so a bare r2_key stored as
  playback_url correctly returns 503 instead of a broken non-HTTP URL
- Literal type: VideoUrlResponse.source_type uses Literal['r2','youtube'] for
  Pydantic validation (rejects unexpected values at serialization time)
- Tests: added bare-key-fallback→503 and inactive-video→404 coverage (10 tests)

graceful degradation. Execution engine adds retry with exponential
backoff, circuit breaker, receipt validation, and LI.FI contractCalls
for atomic bridge+deposit. Journal voice tripled phrase pool with

to disk, pool_id tracking, position_usd recovery from deposited pool.

commit.message:
Fix 6 QA bugs: optimize retry/NaN/EXIF, staging URL crash, maintenance isolation/emails

- Remove re-raise after failure recording to prevent 3x failure counting via async retry
- Guard analyse_white_balance against NaN crash on solid-color images
- Reset EXIF Orientation tag after physical rotation to prevent double-rotation
- Wrap staging preview presigned URLs in try/except to prevent endpoint crash
- Add task-level error isolation in maintenance Lambda (import BotoCoreError)
- Set expiry_warned before sending email to prevent duplicate warning emails

commit.message:
Add working CLI: rusty-backup prints help, version, lists devices on G4

Real CLI implementation (rust_cli_real.c) provides:
- std_env_args via _NSGetArgc/_NSGetArgv for macOS Tiger
- print_usage with actual rusty-backup help text
- Subcommand dispatch (backup, restore, list-devices, inspect, rip)
- flag_value/has_flag argument parsing

Runtime v2 (rust_runtime_v2.c) provides 151 sanitized path symbols
for :: -> _ label mangling. Reserved word symbols in rust_reserved.s.

Binary runs natively on Dual G4 (Mac OS X Tiger 10.4.12):
  ./rusty-backup-ppc --help      → prints usage
  ./rusty-backup-ppc --version   → 0.1.0-ppc
  ./rusty-backup-ppc list-devices → enumerates /dev/disk*

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix: emergency close failures + P&L corrections (Fix #83, #84) v1.10.1

Fix #83: Emergency close on worthless long legs (bid=$0) — skip closing
(expires worthless on 0DTE), $0.05 min tick fallback, cancel zombie orders
after 409 Conflict, remove narrow time-based limit-only check. Commission
tracks actual legs closed.

Fix #84: Dashboard P&L history missing post-settlement point — add final
P&L snapshot after settlement in both empty-registry and normal paths.

HOMER: retry DB population on transient "unable to open" errors.
Journal: Mar 9 commission $70→$67.50, P&L -$715→-$712.50.

commit.message:
fix: kill tmux session on any error after creation in session.Create

Any failure after NewSession (hooks write, SendKeys, LogSessionEvent)
previously returned an error but left the tmux session alive, creating
an orphan. Now all error paths call KillSession before returning.

Refs #90

Multi-photo upload, separate camera/library inputs

Library button now allows selecting multiple photos at once. Camera
and Library use separate hidden file inputs — camera has capture=

capture attribute (opens file picker without Take Photo option).
Bump SW to v25.

- SimuladorOrcamento loads orcamentos from context instead of localStorage,

  compliance, current controls, agent autonomy preferences, and system links

commit.message:
Upgrade address autocomplete: Photon API + forced selection validation

- Switched from Nominatim to Photon (Komoot) geocoder — Elasticsearch-based,
  works after 3 chars instead of requiring near-complete addresses
- Location bias to Greenville, SC (lat/lon) for hyper-relevant suggestions
- Faster debounce (200ms vs 350ms), lower trigger threshold (3 chars vs 4)
- Deduplication of identical labels
- Forced selection: addrVerified flag tracks whether user picked from dropdown
- Validation blocks Next with "Please select your address from suggestions"
- Blur warning shows inline hint if text entered but no option selected
- Keyboard nav + click-outside unchanged
